3308120.name: Cha Recoil
3308120.description:
Cha Recoil is a shooter which is somewhere between bullet hell and twin stick (and possibly a platformer? idk). You navigate the game world with bullets - literally. Your only means of traversal in this game is by using recoil from the bullets. The fact that you have to fire at enemies and at the same time think about where you'll end up doing that will keep you on your toes.

We just want this to be a fun experience.

Game is still WIP and expected to be released sometime 2025 (hopefully) or whenever we feel like this is good enough to be released.

Thank you for visiting and we hope to see you back again.

Cheers~
